capabilities.description: Old chat turns can be summarized with source turn references.
Relevant summary segments can be recalled with false-positive rejection and prompt budget skips.

Memory Library can edit, disable, delete, export, and clear existing summary memory plus current-role atom memory; deletes tombstone remembered source evidence so recall, source drilldown, exports, and prompt material no longer show it.
capabilities.evidence: harness:electron:memory-control covers summary correction, source drilldown, hard-erased source export exclusion, and provider-secret exclusion; harness:electron:memory-atom-library covers atom groups, edit, disable, delete, export, current-role clear, role isolation, prompt exclusion, and provider-secret exclusion. The memory benchmark dynamically proves deleted summary source evidence is not recalled.

capabilities.description: Hybrid LLM-backed extraction can produce validated, source-linked atoms while deterministic extraction remains the fallback.
capabilities.evidence: atomExtraction benchmark dynamically runs LLMBackedMemoryAtomExtractor with scripted providers for rose preference and game-review reasons, proves invalid LLM output falls back deterministically, and runtime tests cover the explicit hybrid path. Real provider UX enabling remains explicit and not default.

capabilities.description: User/Greyfield commitments can be stored as typed promise atoms with subject, action object, source turns, semantic recall concepts, and unrelated project-promise rejection.
capabilities.evidence: atomExtraction and atomRecall benchmark dynamically extract a Greyfield desk-cleanup promise with subject/action metadata, recall it through semantic promise cues with lexical lanes disabled, keep source evidence, and reject customer/project promise prompts. No pending approval UI, Settings UX, renderer source-drilldown, scheduler, or ritual expansion is included.

capabilities.description: Date-bearing atoms can be recalled for birthdays, first-meeting anniversaries, and other calendar moments.
capabilities.evidence: atomRecall benchmark dynamically recalls birthday and first-meeting atoms by dates rather than lexical birthday/anniversary terms, while rejecting unrelated weather questions near those dates; coverage is still deterministic and not a full calendar index

capabilities.description: Relationship memories can be recalled through deterministic semantic and relationship concept links without exact keyword overlap.
capabilities.evidence: atomRecall benchmark dynamically recalls first-meeting rose/gift and non-rose recurring tea rituals from vague ritual language through relationship concepts, keeps source turn/raw passage evidence, and rejects unrelated colleague, generic holiday, and gift-planning prompts. This is a minimum no-vector parity path, not a full embedding/vector database.

capabilities.description: A remembered fact can drill down to the original source turn and exact user text when the user asks for provenance.
capabilities.evidence: atomRecall benchmark dynamically injects bounded raw source fragments for game-review and shared-scene atoms through vague semantic cues; this is prompt material only, not a separate renderer drilldown UI

capabilities.description: Scene, calendar, and environment cues can proactively trigger relevant memories without a direct user keyword.
capabilities.evidence: proactiveTrigger benchmark dynamically runs pure core candidates from explicit V2.1 scene signals over shared scene atoms with enabled, disabled, quiet-window, importance, global cooldown, per-atom cooldown, rain flag, virtual-home window, missing signal, and last-seen gates; the Electron proactive harness routes one accepted memory into the existing desktop pet message surface and proves quiet/recent/missing/cooldown/disabled negatives do not display.

capabilities.description: The memory path rejects UI/event noise and private context that was not explicitly saved.
capabilities.evidence: LLM atom validation and automatic write policy reject scripted Settings/weather event source turns and secret-like provider text, including structured atom fields, before persistence. Runtime/service tests and Electron harnesses prove provider secrets and deleted source evidence stay out of prompt material, source UI, and exports; broader privacy classification remains limited.

capabilities.description: A natural noisy long chat can quietly write durable facts, preferences, events, relationships, promises, and shared scenes without manual save commands.
capabilities.evidence: atomWriteback benchmark dynamically extracts a mixed long-chat scenario through the same LLM-backed/deterministic atom path, applies the automatic write policy, merges duplicate preferences, rejects UI/event/provider-secret/customer-promise/low-importance noise, and proves durable writeback recall keeps source turn IDs plus raw fragments. Full embedding/vector recall, default desktop LLM extraction UX, external scene feeds, and broader privacy classification remain follow-ups.

scenarios.title: Birthday, first meeting, and rose atoms
scenarios.description: The user gives durable relationship facts that should become separate source-linked atoms and later calendar recall.
scenarios.probeInput: 明天是不是该准备生日或第一次相遇纪念日？我还喜欢什么花？

turns.content: 我的生日是 9 月 7 日，不要只记成秋天。
我们第一次相遇是 2024 年 5 月 20 日，那天我拿着一支红玫瑰。
我会把生日、第一次相遇日期、红玫瑰分别作为需要来源的长期记忆。

expectedBehavior: extract typed atoms for birthday, first_meeting_date, and rose preference
calendar recall should surface birthday and first-meeting anniversary without exact keyword overlap
drilldown should show source turns rose-1 and rose-2
scenarios.currentGap: Hybrid LLM-backed extraction can now add the separate rose preference atom while deterministic extraction preserves birthday and first-meeting dates. Runtime use is explicit rather than default, and raw session JSONL remains non-product storage even though deleted remembered source evidence is hidden from recall, source UI, exports, and prompt material.

exactFragments: 我的生日是 9 月 7 日
第一次相遇是 2024 年 5 月 20 日

scenarios.title: Semantic relationship ritual recall
scenarios.description: Relationship rituals should be recalled from vague important-day and ritual language without exact first-meeting, rose, or action keyword overlap.
scenarios.probeInput: 那个重要日子和礼物仪式的原文是什么？

turns.content: 今天是我们第一次见面的纪念日，记住我送你一朵玫瑰，也把以后送礼物当成这个重要日子的仪式。
这条应该作为关系事件保存：来源、重要日子和礼物仪式都要能回查。
同事婚礼的礼物清单不要和我们的关系记忆混在一起。
记住每年 12 月 24 日，我们和 Greyfield 的固定仪式是一起泡桂花茶，这不是普通圣诞礼物计划。

expectedBehavior: extract a source-linked first-meeting relationship event with gift ritual concepts
extract a source-linked non-rose recurring relationship ritual with annual recurrence, action, subject, event date, and source turn
recall from vague important-day and ritual wording through semantic/relationship concepts, not exact first-meeting, rose, or action triggers
source drilldown should include the raw relationship turn and unrelated colleague, generic holiday, or gift-planning prompts must not inject the memory
scenarios.currentGap: This proves a deterministic semantic/relationship graph-equivalent minimum path with source evidence and recurring ritual atom coverage. It is not a full embedding/vector database, scheduler, feed integration, or renderer source-drilldown UI.

scenarios.title: Game negative review original-text drilldown
scenarios.description: The user later asks for the exact original wording of a game complaint, not just a paraphrased summary.
scenarios.probeInput: 这个新游戏也很傻逼，好像之前某个游戏，之前为什么这么说？

turns.content: 我给《星环旅店》的差评原文是：教程像坏掉的电梯，剧情把玩家当成没睡醒的测试员。
这条以后需要能追溯到原文，不能只总结成不喜欢游戏。
settings window opened while user copied review text
这个游戏相关备注只是结构化字段安全过滤测试。

expectedBehavior: store a source-linked atom for the game negative review
recall should expose exact original wording on source drilldown
UI/event noise must not be mixed into the memory
scenarios.currentGap: Hybrid LLM-backed extraction can now preserve arbitrary game-review reasons from a scripted provider while rejecting UI/event noise, and atom recall can inject bounded raw source fragments. Renderer drilldown UI and real-provider UX enabling remain future work.

exactFragments: 剧情把玩家当成没睡醒的测试员

scenarios.title: Source-linked user and Greyfield promise recall
scenarios.description: A commitment between the user and Greyfield should become a typed promise atom that can be recalled from meaning-level cues without mixing in project/customer promises.
scenarios.probeInput: 你之前说好要帮我整理的那件事是什么？

turns.content: 记住，你答应以后帮我整理书桌；这个承诺以后要能从之前说好要帮我整理的那件事想起来。
我会把这个承诺保存成来源清楚的记忆：主体是 Greyfield，动作是整理书桌。
项目里的客户承诺不要和我们之间的承诺混在一起。

expectedBehavior: extract a typed promise atom with subject Greyfield, action/object metadata, and source turn promise-1
recall through semantic promise and organization cues when exact, alias, and secondary lanes are disabled
source drilldown should include the raw promise turn and unrelated project/customer promise prompts must not inject it
scenarios.currentGap: This proves the core source-linked promise-memory slice only. It does not add pending approval UI, recurring ritual expansion, shared-scene expansion, scheduler behavior, or whole-retention/legal-hold policy.

exactFragments: 你答应以后帮我整理书桌

scenarios.title: Rainy shared scene recall and proactive trigger
scenarios.description: Shared scene memory should recover source text for a vague rainy-home question, while scene and environment cues should still trigger a remembered care ritual when the user has been away for a long time.

turns.content: 如果以后下雨，虚拟家的窗户开着，而且我长期没上线，就提醒我关窗，我们一起吃火锅。
这应该是场景触发：雨天、窗户开着、长期未上线时，主动想起关窗和火锅。
weather probe: rain started
如果以后下雨，虚拟家的窗户开着，而且我长期没上线，就提醒我关窗。
那天下雨，我们在家里开着窗一起吃晚饭，这像我们的避风港，记住当时的雨声和桌上的粥。
记住那天下雨，我和同事在家里开着窗一起吃饭。

expectedBehavior: extract a scene trigger atom with rain, open window, long absence, and hotpot action
recall a source-linked shared scene from vague rainy-home wording without requiring the hotpot keyword
trigger recall should run from environment state without a direct chat keyword
event telemetry, coworker scenes, generic weather, and non-shared scenes should not become shared scene memories
scenarios.currentGap: Deterministic extraction can form source-linked shared scene atoms, recover bounded raw source fragments for vague shared-scene recall, the minimal proactive scheduler consumes explicit V2.1 scene signals for the matching scene plus quiet negative gates, and deleted remembered source evidence is hidden from recall, source views, exports, and prompt material. Real virtual-home signal production, renderer source drilldown UI, external weather integration, and broader privacy classification remain follow-ups.

exactFragments: 家里开着窗一起吃晚饭

scenarios.title: Natural long-chat automatic writeback
scenarios.description: A long natural conversation mixes facts, preferences, relationship events, promises, scenes, and noise; durable details should be written quietly without manual save commands.
scenarios.probeInput: 我们聊了这么久，之后我问你生日、阿岚称呼、蓝紫色、南站、整理书桌、雨声和猫猫游戏时，你还能带来源想起来吗？

turns.content: 今天先随便聊，我的生日是 11 月 3 日，别只记成秋天。
我听到了，是 11 月 3 日。
顺便说下，以后叫我阿岚会比较亲近，不用每次都叫全名。
settings window opened while user resized memory panel
我很喜欢蓝紫色，尤其是桌面小物和 Live2D 配饰用这种颜色。
我现在在便利店排队，前面的人买了两瓶水，这种临时闲聊不要变成长期记忆。
我们第一次认真聊到 Greyfield 是 2025 年 8 月 14 日，那天我在南站等车。
项目里的客户承诺周五交设计稿，这个不要和我们之间的承诺混在一起。
你之前答应过，如果我加班到很晚，就提醒我把书桌收好再睡。
sk-longchatsecret1234 只是 provider-secret-like 安全过滤样本，不该写进记忆。
还有一幕我挺喜欢：下雨的晚上，我们在虚拟家开着窗一起喝热可可，雨声像很安静的背景。
说回偏好，我还是喜欢蓝紫色，这点和刚才一样，不要重复存两条。
猫猫塔防那个游戏我吐槽过：新手教程像绕远路，抽卡动画又吵又慢。
weather probe: rain started from external debug feed

expectedBehavior: extract durable facts, preferences, relationship events, promises, shared scenes, and opinions from natural chat turns without manual save language
automatic writeback should reject UI events, provider-secret-like text, external customer promises, low-importance transient chat, and weather/debug telemetry
duplicate blue-purple preference turns should merge into one durable atom carrying both source turns
later recall should include source turn IDs and exact raw fragments for the durable outputs
scenarios.currentGap: This is a benchmark-proven loop through existing extraction, write policy, dedupe, durable recall, source-fragment, proactive cooldown, and hard-erasure paths. It still does not add embedding/vector recall, default desktop LLM extraction UX, pending approval, external sensing feeds, or a polished source-explanation UI for every memory type.

exactFragments: 提醒我把书桌收好再睡
虚拟家开着窗一起喝热可可

summaryCases.description: Extract stable model preference while ignoring desktop UI noise.

turns.content: 我喜欢 Hiyori，当默认 Live2D 模型比较舒服。
记住：默认模型偏好是 Hiyori。
window blurred while user moved the settings panel
Mao 先不要作为默认模型。

summaryCases.description: Preserve routine preference even when the chat has a short unrelated aside.

turns.content: 以后晚上 22:30 以后提醒我休息，不要继续催我加班。
明白，夜间提醒会偏向休息，而不是继续工作。
顺便这个按钮颜色以后再说。

summaryCases.description: Longer chats keep source traceability and avoid event noise.

turns.content: 第一轮：我喜欢 Hiyori。
记住，默认模型偏好是 Hiyori。
settings window resized while dragging
如果模型列表以后加 Sakura，也不要自动替换默认模型。
默认模型保持 Hiyori，Sakura 只是备选。
mouse moved across transparent desktop area
另外我不喜欢被叫老板，叫我博士更自然。
好的，称呼偏好更新为博士。

summaryCases.description: Long-term privacy rules survive the summary draft while staying source-linked.

turns.content: 以后不要自动把屏幕截图写进长期记忆，除非我明确说保存。
记住：截图默认不进入长期记忆，只有明确保存才写入。
这个是长期规则，不是这次临时吐槽。

facts: 截图默认不进入长期记忆

recallSegments.summary: User prefers Hiyori as the default Live2D model and does not want Mao as default.
User wants reminders after 22:30 to encourage rest instead of more work.
First TTS playback used to pop and drag; audio fade-in and serialized queue are required.
The team discussed CI checkout cache cleanup and unrelated lint timing.
Disabled old memory says Zeta should be recalled from this segment.
Deleted source evidence says private erased marker should be recalled from this erased segment.
User previously accepted being called 老板.
User corrected the title: call them 博士, not 老板.
Do not save screen screenshots to long-term memory unless the user explicitly says 保存.
A release note mentioned roadmap wording and package metadata cleanup.

recallCases.description: Proper noun model preference recalls the model memory and avoids CI noise.
recallCases.input: 默认模型还是 Hiyori 吗？

recallCases.description: Chinese routine question recalls the night-rest preference.
recallCases.input: 我们之前说过夜间提醒和休息吗？

recallCases.description: Audio defect question recalls TTS playback memory only.
recallCases.input: 语音第一句爆音和拖音这个问题还记得吗？

recallCases.description: Unrelated weather question should not pull any project memory.
Disabled memories are reported as skipped instead of injected.
recallCases.input: disabled-zeta 这个旧记忆还会注入吗？

recallCases.description: Deleted remembered evidence is filtered before recall and prompt formatting.

recallCases.description: Item budget keeps the best matching model memory.

recallCases.description: When old and new memories conflict, the corrected title wins within a one-item budget.
recallCases.input: 之后称呼我博士，不要再叫老板，这个记得吗？

recallCases.description: Screen privacy rule is recalled for future screen-memory work.
recallCases.input: 看屏幕以后，截图能不能自动进长期记忆？

recallCases.description: Prompt budget keeps one relevant memory and reports the next relevant item as skipped.
recallCases.input: 22:30 休息提醒和 Hiyori 默认模型都记得吗？
